title: Defense Research and Planetary Assistance Center

The '''Defense Research and Planetary Assistance Center''', or '''DRAPAC''', was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] research installation that was rushed into construction upon [[Mount Yoda]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] deep within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] suggested Mount Yoda, formerly Mount Dagger, as the location for the DRAPAC facility due to the location's reputation for being haunted and cursed. The facility twelve levels including housing, a full commissary, and private tutoring for the children of the military and civilian staff. Among these students were [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] informal [[Padawan/Legends|apprentices]]: [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi]] Prince [[Ken]], [[Zak Arranda/Legends|Zak Arranda]], and [[Tash Arranda/Legends|Tash Arranda]]. The thirteenth level was restricted on to top-level [[Senate Planetary Intelligence Network|SPIN]] personnel as it contained a number of classified experiments such as [[Project Decoy]].<ref name="SPINblog">{{SW|url=news/the-star-wars-spy-game-spin-declassified|text=The ''Star Wars'' Spy Game: SPIN Declassified|int=The Star Wars Spy Game: SPIN Declassified|nolive=1}}</ref>
